title: Claude Code Subagent Frontmatter
description: Validates YAML frontmatter of a custom Claude Code subagent file. Source: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sub-agents

name.description: Unique identifier — kebab-case, lowercase letters and hyphens only

description.description: When Claude should delegate to this subagent. Add 'Use proactively' for auto-trigger.

tools.description: Allowlist of tools. Comma-separated string or array. Inherits all tools if omitted.

disallowedTools.description: Tools to deny. Applied before `tools` resolution.

model.description: Model alias, full model ID, or 'inherit'. Defaults to 'inherit'.

maxTurns.description: Max agentic turns before subagent stops.

skills.description: Skill names to load into subagent context at startup.

mcpServers.description: MCP servers — string references or inline configs.

hooks.description: Lifecycle hooks (PreToolUse / PostToolUse / Stop). Cleanup when subagent finishes.

memory.description: Persistent memory scope. Enables ~/.claude/agent-memory/ or .claude/agent-memory/ directory.

background.description: Always run as background task. Default false.

effort.description: Effort level. Inherits from session if omitted.

isolation.description: Run in temporary git worktree (isolated copy of repo).

color.description: Display color in agent panel and transcript.

initialPrompt.description: Auto-submitted as first user turn when running as main session via --agent. Not used when subagent is delegated to.
